statisticsParser.fontSize.title: Font Size
statisticsParser.fontSize.description: Font size for the Parse Statistics tab, relative to the Visual Studio Environment Font.

statisticsParser.tempTableNamesMode.title: Temp Table Names
statisticsParser.tempTableNamesMode.description: How to render temp table names in the Parse Statistics grid.

statisticsParser.suppressZeroColumns.title: Hide All-Zero Columns
statisticsParser.suppressZeroColumns.description: Hide columns from the Parse Statistics grid when every row in the result set is zero for that column.

statisticsParser.convertCompletionTimeTo.title: Convert Completion Time to local time
statisticsParser.convertCompletionTimeTo.description: Show 'Completion Time' lines from the Messages tab in the local time zone instead of the server's reported offset.

statisticsParser.title: Statistics Parser
statisticsParser.description: Transforms STATISTICS IO / STATISTICS TIME output from the Messages tab into a structured, readable view.
